BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.VoiceOfSpirits: You have come into contact with the Gift Spirit.

By calming your mind and concentrating, you can open your mind to the spiritual world and communicate with restless souls. Spend 1 Soma to contact a creature with the Spirit Gift you've previously encountered. You do not suffer the Wound caused by the stress of spiritual connection.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.WolfKiller.req: Having faced the wolves in a fight at least once.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.WolfKiller.eff: You know how to deal with the fiercest of wolves and are careful not to be surrounded. When you obtain at least a Standard Outcome on a Position or Defense Check against a pack of beasts, you can immediately eliminate 1 Minor animal NPC with 1 Wound.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.Sweetie.name: Where are you going all alone, sweetie?
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.Sweetie.requir: To meet Iskra alone in the forest.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.Sweetie.effect: You are attracted to the little girl who pretends to be a wolf and you dream of devouring her. Once per Scene, you can spend 1 Soma to know exactly where she is. If you anticipate her and arrive somewhere before her, you get 1 Additional Success on every Check you make to hurt or devour that little morsel. As long as she is present in the Scene, you receive 1 Penalty in all Defense Checks.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.Sweetie.specia: Special Gift for Garou the Old Wolf
I have been a lot of things in my life: ship captain, duellist of great renown, and lover of the most beautiful noblewomen. After years of successes and victories, a mysterious child defeated me with deception. This despicable boy led me into the lair of a dangerous beast and, after imprisoning me, left me to be eaten by the monster. I survived, though I lost a hand... I know for certain he who I seek is no human, and I joined the Order to hunt down the child I hate above all else, and thus have my revenge.
I am a skilled swordsman and possess fine manners, which is why the Order considers me an excellent candidate to move among High Society. I love indulging in good food and dissolute company.
I have learned to face monsters and aberrations without being intimidated. The Beast is on my trail because, having tasted my flesh, it can no longer do without it…
I am a man of the world and nothing can really surprise me anymore. I never question myself. After all, I’m the best at what I do.

Once per Scene you may perform a gesture of extreme precision with your weapon, such as slipping an object off someone or writing something on a surface. The person observing your skill will either be impressed or intimidated, depending on the Storyteller’s decision. You receive 1 Additional Success when you use the emotion you have aroused to your advantage.

While outdoors, you may ask the Storyteller for the Beast to come in search of your flesh. The Beast is a monstrous NPC with the following characteristics: OL Hard 7 – (4 Wounds). Descriptor (the Beast): I am a great and mighty beast. I overwhelm everything I come across on my way to snatch my prey. Gift – Ravenous Madness: The Beast has an insane craving for your flesh, and will unleash its rage on anyone standing in its way. With its titanic strength, it can tear down trees and walls, and hurl a man away with a single swipe of its huge paws. The Beast is also quite stupid and will leave the Scene as soon as you are out of sight. You receive 2 Additional Successes to any Defense Check against it. If the Beast suffers the fourth Wound, it will dissolve. However, it will regenerate and can be used in the next Scene.

When you choose an opponent, there is no escape for them. Once per Scene, you can take an additional action against the target of your challenge (even if you had already acted during this Exchange) to anticipate their move and stop their action with yours. If an opponent inflicts a Wound on you, you savor the taste of the challenge and receive 1 Additional Success at each Check against them for the rest of the Scenario.
You challenge an enemy or otherwise make clear who and how skilled you are.
A fine dueling blade
a black powder gun
a finely crafted hook
a purple-red cloak
traveling boots
a precious pair of binoculars
several valuable rings

I am a mountain wolf and far more cunning than the stupid villagers who tremble at the mere sight of me. I have lived proudly at the head of my pack, leading a thousand raids and eating succulent, tender morsels of human flesh. But I am not so old I cannot face those who hate me the most, though I may be hunted and reviled. Now that I’m part of the Order, I use my strength to defend the weak hunters who are my companions, knowing that with a single bite I could end their insignificant lives.

My senses are unfailing. Nothing can escape my sense of smell and that is why the Order uses me as a guardian. I hate strong smells and loud noises because they feel like burning irons to acute senses.

A true predator knows how to appear as the most helpless of lambs. I know how to disguise myself. My confidence is boundless and I often tend to underestimate danger, ready to risk anything for a tasty bite.
I am fiercer and more powerful than any human and my fangs can pierce even metal. My proud wolf spirit is everything to me.

Once you catch someone’s scent, you never forget it. During a Scene, you can spend 1 Soma to memorize the scent of a person you are interacting with. You will always recognize it and it will be easy for you to follow its traces even after some time. If you concentrate, you can hear a noise even at great distances. When someone approaches you, the Storyteller will warn you long before anyone else in the Scene would notice.

You may spend 1 Soma to assume the shape of a common human. Create a Descriptor that represents you and includes at least one of these words: Old, Helpless, Weak. In your human form you can speak and act without problems, but, as soon as you use your Dark Ego, you will immediately lose the effect of Wolf Among the Lambs. You receive 1 Additional Success when you use the Descriptor you created to deceive someone and catch them off guard.

You are hardened by a lifetime in the great mountains and your skill is matched only by your courage. When you unleash your rage, create a Descriptor for it that includes at least one of these words: Strong, Fierce, Unstoppable. You can employ the strength of three men, gnaw through stone as easily as flesh, or break down any barrier. When you act using this special Descriptor for Position Checks, you get 1 Additional Success. Once per Scene, you can unleash your rage and receive 3 Additional Successes instead of 1.
You assume the form of a Wolf or reveal yourself for what you really are, scaring off weak humans.
Fangs and claws (natural weapons)
a necklace of stones and wood that I carry in a paw—token of the only human I do not consider food

I have always made my art my reason for living. I can play so skillfully that it might as well be magic. I have learned to use the power of music to reach into the souls of both humans and animals. Unfortunately, I have lost count of the number of times I have performed dishonorable acts while pursuing the perfect melody. Having been guilty of various crimes and having taken revenge on those who mocked my sincere love for music, I serenely waited for my execution. The Order freed me in exchange for a promise to serve them and put my skills to work in the fight against Darkness. It was in the darkest moments that I glimpsed the perfect melody, so perhaps as a Hunter, I can find it and make it my own.
With my pipe I can play any melody and touch the hearts of living beings. Art needs time to express itself.

I am a skilled acrobat and musician. My talent is unrivaled and the Order has chosen me for my ability to capture people’s attention and stimulate their emotions. When I am in the grip of artistic inspiration, I am totally divorced from reality.
As an artist I have traveled to many places and I know many myths and legends. I’m hungry for knowledge and I’m fascinated by everything I don’t know.

When you play your pipes you can spend 1 Soma to sing a special melody. Choose from: 1. Imparting an emotion: Create a Descriptor that represents the emotional state you wish to convey. Everybody present will receive that Descriptor for the current Scene. You may have to make a Position Check to affect opponents. 2. Bewitching animals: You may give simple commands to animals that hear your melody. If they show an aggressive attitude, you have to make a successful Position Check for your melody to take effect. As long as you are playing, you may ask the animals to do simple actions such as moving or following a simple command.

When you sing, dance, or move with grace, you always put on a great show. As an additional action, you can spend 1 Soma and decide on one of the following effects: 1. You can make an incredible leap, many feet high, without anyone being able to stop you. 2. You may take an object, even if it is worn by an enemy. 3. You can perform a minor action with a stunt, such as opening a door or flipping a switch, and then return exactly to where you started.

Once per Scene, you can make a sound that can be heard by whomever you wish, even from a great distance. Everyone who hears it suffers 1 Wound, fragile objects break, and frightened animals flee. Alternatively, you can play a gentle melody and the wind itself will obey you, carrying your message to whomever you wish, wherever they are. When using The Power of Music, you can also activate a Soul Music effect on one or more targets of your choice.
Demonstrate your art to its fullest extent, with a show that cannot be ignored.
A precious pipe of the finest workmanship
a theater mask
a cloak of many colors
multicolored chalks and powders
an old ocarina (the first instrument I ever played), and Hamelin
my faithful trained mouse

I am a child witch, and my power is equal only to my ambition. I did not have a childhood, for I was born already aware of my abilities. To most, I seem cynical and cruel. That is because they do not understand that they are pawns, insignificant pieces in the bloody games that witches and warlocks play. The Order does not look down on my age, which is why it has given me the leadership I deserve.
I am a sorceress and my magical powers allow me to do whatever I want. I need the right amount of time to cast my spells.
I am very skilled at reading people, that is why the Order has chosen me as leader of the Hunters. I love manipulating people and I often do it merely to amuse myself.

Like any respectable sorceress, I carry my trusty bag full of herbs, poisons, and all kinds of magic tools. My childlike appearance is often useful, but sometimes it leads others to underestimate me. I hate that.

When you want to achieve something, you may use witchcraft. Choose what you want with a sentence like: I want to fly on that old broom, or I want to look like a demon in the eyes of those fools. Your spell must be focused on an object in your possession, such as a broom to fly or a mask you can wear to look like a demon. Pay a cost from 0 to 2 Soma, decided by the Storyteller, to activate your spell for the duration of a Scene. Remember that you can’t ask for someone’s sudden death, but you can inflict Wounds with your actions through magic.

Once per Scene, when you talk to someone, you can ask the Storyteller a question about them. The question must be regarding their behaviour, such as any vices or their desires they might have. You gain 1 Additional Success in any action where you exploit what you’ve discovered.

Receive 1 Additional Success on any Check when you use one of your spells, either through the Magic Gift or by inserting it into your narrative through the Descriptors. Moreover, you can unleash your evil aura to gain one or more of the following effects: 1. Animals and ordinary people are tormented by your presence and will flee in terror. 2. You gain 1 Additional Success if you use your magic to punish someone for breaking a promise or agreement you made earlier. 3. In the area around you, you can summon daylight or darkness.
Scare ordinary people or dispense punishment through your magic.
An old and worn-out black cloak
a bag of magical ingredients
a small curved dagger
a rag doll
the Ring of the Order
a lucky elderberry branch
the keys of a strange hut in a tree which is always in my vicinity

I was born to be a leader and I have always surrounded myself with faithful followers ready to satisfy my every whim. Lacking the benefit of noble birth, the power I held was pried from the hands of those less deserving to wield it, no matter the cost. I ruled armies of thugs, and broke the hearts of both men and women. After each conquest, I set out in search of a bigger challenge. Because there is still so much out there that should be rightfully mine, I always want more. The Order has given me a new purpose, a new perspective, and new creatures to enslave.

I am determined to get what I want, and nothing will get in my way. I will kill, humiliate, or conquer anything that stands between me and my objective. As you can imagine, I sincerely hate being told no!

Thanks to my contacts and charisma, I always have an ace up my sleeve: followers ready to help me and allies who owe me favors. Maintaining an empire of beneficial connections requires commitment and resources.
I have an enviable charm and love to dress up to fit the role I have chosen. Even when I try to restrain myself, I never go unnoticed.

When you act with clear and direct intention to achieve an objective, you get 1 Additional Success on each Position Check. Once per Session, you can turn a Failure into an Outcome with Increment. Describe how you grit your teeth and fight to get what you want.

During a Scene you always have a couple of trusted servants with you, ready to execute your every order. Create a Descriptor for each, which represents the skill for which you hold them in your service. Your servants will do their best to satisfy your every wish. Decide how you pay them. The Storyteller, when and if they deem it necessary, will ask you to honor their services so as not to lose the use of this Gift for the rest of the Scene. You can check this Descriptor multiple times to get XP.

You know that your way is the only right way to do things. During the Scene, as an additional action, you can choose another character who will be issued a command. In the case of an ally, if they do exactly what you tell them, they will receive 1 Additional Success to their action or increase their Opposition Level by 1. If you give a peremptory order to ensnare an enemy, they will lower their Opposition Level by 1 or, if you’ve already seen it in action, you can prevent them from using one of their Gifts. Once per Scene, you can shout, drawing everyone’s attention to you. For a few moments, they will pause to listen to what you have to say.
Take control of a situation and impose your decisions by dramatically drawing attention to yourself.
A long leather whip with metal studs and spikes
a beautiful fan to hide my face, dresses for every occasion
a long burgundy cape, gold and jewels gifted by countless suitors
a sharp stiletto I wear as a hairpin

After years of honorable service as State Inquisitor of the Republic of Venice, my body and spirit have undergone a rare mutation and fear is now unknown to me. People have always called me Bogeyman, fearing the justice that I represented. Perhaps my own absence of fear made me even more terrifying in the eyes of mortals. The Order has given me a new assignment because even in the fight against darkness, someone needs to be ready to judge what is right and what is wrong.
I am good at understanding, evaluating, and grasping every hidden detail, which is why the Order wanted me as a judge. I am cold, methodical, and cannot stand when plans change abruptly.
My body is made of pure shadow and I can become intangible for brief moments. I hate sunlight and cannot properly focus when not surrounded by a comforting shadow.
My presence intimidates people, touching the fear that dwells deep in their hearts. The presence of children and their innocent way of looking at the world makes me uneasy.

Once per Scene, when you meet a group of NPCs you will immediately understand who is the most and the least capable of them. Moreover, the Storyteller will also reveal to you if there are relationships such as love, hate, or fidelity between two NPCs of your choice. Receive 1 Additional Success when you use the information you have discovered to intimidate or question someone.

You can spend 1 Soma to manipulate the shadows to your advantage, choose from: 1. Acquire a small object, even if it is held by someone, as long as you can see it. 2. Make an object in your immediate vicinity topple down. 3. Stretch a shadow and manipulate its shape to make it look different. Additionally, you always receive 1 Additional Success on any Defense Check you make while in a shaded area. If you get a successful Outcome, as an additional effect you can move from one shadow to another and no one can prevent it.

You are like a sinuous shadow that can reach anywhere. During a Scene, you can arrive at a location by covering any distance and overcoming any obstacle if one of your allies or an NPC calls your name. When you manifest your true nature, everyone who witnesses it will be frightened and will not act against you unless you threaten them first. The Storyteller may ask you for a Position Check to frighten particularly powerful characters. Receive 1 Additional Success on all Defense Checks you make against the actions of someone who is now fearful.
Enter or leave a shadow by manifesting your true nature and scaring someone.
A precious elegant black dress
a cape and a top hat
a sturdy cane with a hidden blade
a monocle lens
an exquisitely crafted Larva (typical mask of the Venice Carnival)
an accurate pocket watch

My memory is gone. The first thing I remember is the Order finding me, wandering in the woods naked and covered in blood. I possess extraordinary strength and a feral instinct, such that any civilized society ought to chain me like a monster. I know that in my past is a sin so great, my memory could not bear the weight of it. But, I want to remember and perhaps by serving the Order I will be able to do so. I have a natural soft spot for children, and I can’t stand to see them get hurt. The Order uses me as a weapon in the most serious matters when it is necessary to act decisively and demonstrate that a Hunter is a force to be reckoned with.
I am incredibly strong. Despite my petite looks, I am tougher than the sturdiest of men. I struggle to control my strength and often end up damaging things unintentionally.

Sometimes I manifest strange abilities, the legacy of a past that I no longer remember. But, when I need it, the world around me shapes itself to protect and shelter me. I hate being out in the open and being the center of attention.

I love human flesh and can gain insight about people just looking at them. I am helplessly attracted to those who have a particular physical trait that stimulates my appetite, such as a good smell or velvety skin.

You receive 1 Additional Success to any Position Check that requires you to resort to your strength. If you eliminate a living being by causing a Wound, you can do it in an extremely disturbing way. Anyone who witnesses it, at the discretion of the Storyteller, will lower their Opposition Level by 1 for the next action.

You can spend 1 Soma to draw on the strange powers of the witch you once were. When you do so, choose one of the following effects: 1. Create a shelter for one person, perfectly camouflaged within the environment. 2. Reshape a plant to create ladders, shields, or other simple structures. 3. Make something disgusting/rotten edible and sweet, restoring 1 Wound to whoever eats it (except yourself).

The truth is that you crave human flesh, especially when raw and taken from evil people. When you inflict a Wound through violent action on someone you deem evil, and if you reach an Outcome with an Increment, you may inflict 1 additional Wound. Once per Scene when you consume human flesh, you recover 1 Wound and the Storyteller will reveal some memories of the victim, giving you contextualized information about what you are looking for.
Blatantly manifest your desire to devour human flesh, regardless of the consequences.

A doll and a little wooden soldier — the only items I had with me when I was found. A worn-out gray travel dress stained with blood. A sharp butcher’s knife. A hair ribbon, gift from a Hunter of the Order. A cookbook filled with recipes for cakes and sweets

I am a sorcerer who has found the key to immortality. Long life has only whetted my appetite for power and in its pursuit, I have been stained by every sin. The secret behind my unending existence is that I have hidden my soul, removing it from my body. Unfortunately, the Order found its hiding place and now it is held beyond my reach in a fortified church, leaving me no choice but to submit to their commands. Guilty of one thousand and one crimes, the Order demands I balance each with one thousand and one acts of virtue. According to those foolish preachers, they are leading me down the path of redemption. In truth, the Order treats me as a servant, giving to me only the most thankless tasks, knowing that I can not be subdued by death. I remain humble and silent, waiting for the day when I will discover where they have hidden my soul. Then I will unleash my revenge and annihilate the entire Papacy...
I have knowledge and wisdom drawn from centuries of existence, which I can conjure to mind when needed. I often get lost in the memories of my past glories, forgetting about the world around me.

The Order uses my powers for their own purposes and I have had to become skilled at understanding and supporting the needs of my allies as a result. Although I hate to admit it, over time I have begun to take some pleasure in doing good deeds.

My body is but a tool which I can manipulate at will, far beyond common human limits. In spite of my old and emaciated appearance, I feel neither fatigue nor pain. With matters of the flesh no longer of concern, I value beautiful things and works of art above anything else.

You have been alive for an indefinite time and know almost everything. Once per Scene, you may ask for information about the past or a specific subject or place, which is only available to you due to your long history. The Storyteller will provide relevant and useful details. Once per Scene, you may also change the above Descriptor associated with this Gift to one that represents a skill you have conjured to your immortal mind. This new Descriptor is yours until the end of the Scene, and you receive 1 Additional Success the first time you use it for a Check.

Once per Scene, as an additional action, you can grant 1 Additional Success to an ally’s action if you can narratively support them. You can also always spend your Soma to pay the activation cost of your allies’ Gifts.

When you suffer 1 Wound, you can immediately spend 1 Soma to remain conscious, allowing you to suffer many Wounds without dying. You are in full control of your body, even parts that have been cut off. You can see through a torn eye or continue to use your severed hand. At the end of the Scene in which you activated your Dark Ego, you recover all Wounds suffered except the first one. Your body regenerates and severed parts reattach in a horrific spectacle.
Poor clothes
a worn out sickle (reminder of times past)
a small bag with precious items collected during adventures
a key that opens one of many secret refuges
a papal ring as a symbol of indenture to the Church
a little toy given by someone helped with the first good deed

I am a traveler, and, over the years, I have visited every location known to man. Being a traveling merchant has allowed me to easily hide my talents as a witch from prying eyes. Year after year, I have accumulated all kinds of magical and mundane wealth. But the Order found me and forced me to sign the most one-sided contract of my entire career as a trader. Now I must put my skills and my charisma at the service of the Order, trying to earn as much as possible to redeem the enormous debt that they have made me incur through deceit.
I am a sea witch, and as such, I have the power to shape water and move it at will. I hate enclosed places, cut off from the presence of my beloved sea.

Nobody knows my true form, which I hide under an appearance of eternal youth. I can change shape to some extent, while still remaining in human form. I am hopelessly attracted to all forms of beauty and I often get lost in contemplating it.
I have a massive collection of magical relics and treasures. I am very stingy with my collection and constantly seeking to add to my wealth so I can redeem my freedom.

You can unleash your witch powers and control seawater, manipulating it as if it were solid. You can use it as a weapon or as an object to support your actions, giving it the consistency of a whip that can reach up to thirty feet. When you act, you can take a second supporting action, such as picking up something, moving someone you want to defend, or hindering an enemy’s movement thanks to the water you manipulate. You can also use this Gift with fresh water, but you will need to spend 1 Soma to do so.

Once per Scene you can change your appearance. Create a Descriptor that represents your new appearance. Nobody can pierce your deception, except through magical means or Gifts that allow one to discover the truth. In addition, you may spend 1 Soma to take the specific appearance of a person you have already met, mimicking their voice and manners as well. You can keep your new appearance until the Scene is over.

At the beginning of the Scenario, you receive 2 Treasure Tokens. When you show off your Treasures, spend 1 Treasure Token and 1 Soma, and create a Descriptor that represents it such as Wolf-Slaying Dagger or Lens of Truth. Receive 1 Additional Success for any Check in which your Treasure may be helpful. Alternatively, spend 1 Token to draw a Potion from your pouch to give to someone. Create a Descriptor to represent its magical effect such as Seeing in the dark or Extraordinary strength. Whoever drinks it will be granted the Descriptor you created for 1 Scene, plus 1 Additional Success on the first action in which they use the advantage given by the potion. When you obtain a new treasure or close a favorable deal, you receive 1 Treasure Token.
Turn a request for help or a conversation into a negotiation, making it clear how amazing your treasures are.
Exotic and colorful dresses
a large bag full of treasures
a travel bag
rings and fine jewelry made out of seashells
a vial of sea water
cosmetics and perfumes

I am a devoted clergyman who has always dedicated his life to helping others. Over the years I have become a talented exorcist and this vocation of mine led me to the remote village of Borgo Maleanime. There, I fought a particularly insidious demon, who concealed itself among the ranks of a gang of young thugs who merely pretended to be demons to scare people. It was a tough fight, but I finally got the better of the fiend. Or so I thought. Something in the exorcism did not go as expected and now the demon dwells inside me, sowing fear and pain whenever it re-emerges. The Order welcomed me into its ranks as an exorcist and I gladly accepted this role, with the hope that the missions entrusted to me would allow me to find a way to rid myself, once and for all, of that which hides within me.

I am a skilled exorcist. I know how to identify and fight evil through prayer and the sacred arts. Despite what I am, I hate holy places and manifestations of faith and religion, as they cause the demon inside me to stir.

I am good at understanding people and helping them. Now, thanks to the demon that dwells in me, I can even perceive the dark side of people. Every so often, however, the demon takes over, making me behave strangely in front of ordinary people.
The demon in me grants me its power, allowing me to act with savage strength and speed. It is not easy to contain this ferocity and, often, I end up hurting or destroying things I did not wish to.

When you face a clearly supernatural being, you gain 1 Additional Success on all Checks. You can also invoke sacred rites and prayers to disturb the evil you face. If a subject, artifact, or supernatural manifestation uses a Gift that you know of or have already seen in action, you can spend 1 Soma to prevent its use. Each time you activate this Gift, roll 1 die. If you roll a 5 or a 6, you gain 1 Devil Token.

Once per Scene, you can release the inner demon, whether that’d be yours or someone else’s. In your case, create a Descriptor that represents an emotion that includes the word Anger, Envy, or Wickedness. You receive 2 Additional Successes the first time you use this Descriptor for a Position Check. If you unleash someone else’s inner demon, the Storyteller will create a Descriptor for them that showcases their hidden, dark side. When using this Gift on particularly powerful individuals, the Storyteller may request a Position Check from you to succeed. Each time you use this Gift, you receive 1 Devil Token.

While generally retaining control, every now and then you have to allow the demon to manifest and unleash its anger. Create a Descriptor that represents your demonic form and that includes at least one of these words: Monstrous, Fierce, Beastly. Your physical abilities go far beyond those of a mere mortal, but you will behave like a devil, enjoying the evil and fear you inspire. When you act using this special Descriptor, you gain 1 Additional Success. You can spend 1 Devil Token to inflict 1 additional Wound or to spend as Soma for a Check. Once per Scenario, the Storyteller can spend 1 Devil Token to activate this Gift against your will.
Give free rein to your demonic side or listen to the sound of bells or cowbells for at least one minute.
An old cassock worn from many travels
exorcism vestments and tools
a shepherd’s curved staff of wood and iron to beat the devil with
an old pouch containing mysterious items taken while the demon is in control
precious small relics received as offerings
an old, time-worn bible

I am the most skilled and trusted agent of the Papacy and as such, it is my responsibility to make sure that the fight against darkness never falters. As a child, I fell into a river and almost drowned, but was saved by a creature that I later discovered was a dragon. When I grew up, I took holy vows and joined the Church. In doing so, I discovered that what I believed to be my savior was actually a creature of darkness, ready to steal my soul. I vowed to fight the darkness, suppressing the feeling of gratitude toward the dragon that saved me, which has always plagued me. Such weakness represents a crack through which evil could slither in. No mercy for monsters, no forgiveness for those who would join and serve the forces of evil.
I have dedicated my life to slaying monsters and aberrations, honing my body and my skill for that purpose. My strict discipline makes me rarely inclined to forgive the mistakes of others.
I have vowed to eradicate all evil from this world and nothing can escape my inquisitive gaze. I hate all secrets, for I know that the seed of evil may grow within anyone.
I am a saint in the eyes of ordinary people and no door remains closed for me. My word is that of the Church itself. What I say is not to be questioned.

You’re skilled at slaying monsters and demonic creatures in the name of faith. You start each Scenario with 1 Fervor Token. When facing an enemy that is obviously monstrous, if you get a successful Outcome on a Position Check, you can spend 1 Fervor Token to inflict 1 additional Wound. When such an enemy attempts to overwhelm you using one of their Gifts, you can spend 1 Fervor Token to receive 2 Additional Successes to your Defense Check. When you suffer 1 Wound, you receive 1 Fervor Token.

When you speak to a crowd you can infuse their hearts with the light of faith. Spend 1 Fervor Token and you can create a Descriptor that represents a feeling of faith, anger, and a desire for justice against evil. Alternatively, create a Descriptor that represents trust and submission in such faith. The crowd will act accordingly for the rest of the Scene, but particularly powerful NPCs may be immune to your words. Receive 1 Additional Success on any Check you make using the sentiment you inspired. When you publicly expose evil, you receive 1 Fervor Token.

When you channel sacred divine power, everyone bows their heads. Ordinary people will show you reverence, while weaker enemy NPCs (at the Storyteller’s discretion) won’t target you unless you’re the only available option, nor will they try to get in your way. In your presence, anyone possessing powers linked to the supernatural lowers their Opposition Level by 1. Your holy aura emits an intense light that can illuminate the whole area around you at your will.
Invoke holy divine power by reproaching all sinners and providing an example of purity and righteousness.
Sacred armor
a sword and a spear blessed by the Pope himself
my proud war stallion
a cross engraved with the Keys of Saint Peter (universal symbol of power)
Aldebrand the faithful squire
papal papers and seals
a cloak of fine workmanship

I have no memory of my life before my captivity, although I often dream of the forests and snow-capped peaks of my beloved China. I grew up as a circus animal at London’s Royal Circus but, deep within I carry the conviction that I am destined for something else. I rebelled by killing all my captors, fleeing across a vast and labyrinthine city. When the Order reached me, I thought it was the end, but the Hunters took me with them as their guardian and defender. The more I live as a Hunter, the closer I draw to transcendence. Now I am aware that, someday, I will discover who I really am.
I am a skilled guardian. My body is strong and hardened, my senses sharp and alert. Years of captivity have made me submissive, and I struggle not to follow every order I am given.
I am stronger and faster than any human and I am a highly skilled fighter. I don’t shy away from a challenge because I always believe I can win.

You can intercept a danger before it overwhelms your ally. You may spend 1 Soma to get between an ally and a danger by standing in their place. Receive 1 Additional Success to any Defense Check you have to perform doing so. Once per Scenario, you can ignore 1 Wound you suffer.

You are able to perform athletic feats unthinkable to a mere mortal. You may spend 1 Soma and choose an effect: 1. You can jump incredibly far, up to thirty feet. You can bring another person with you by carrying them on your shoulders. You also ignore any damage related to a fall. 2. Use your tail to manipulate an object and perform an additional action. 3. Ignore any physical impediments to movement by using your impressive skills.

When you release your true power, your body emits a divine light and no one can stop you. Take 1 Wound to get 2 Additional Successes to any physical Checks you have to perform. For the rest of the Scene spells have little effect on you and you get 2 Additional Successes to any Defense Check you make to protect yourself from arcane effects. When you deal a hit to someone, you can spend 1 Soma to inflict 1 additional Wound. The effects of this Gift cease if you behave in a composed and obedient manner, as your role as guardian dictates.
Act with passion and strength, showing everyone the incredible power that lies within your body.
A circus stick with three extendable segments
old and worn circus clothes
a golden diadem so tight on my forehead that it cannot be removed
a sheet with the drawing of a Chinese landscape — gift from a child who once watched one of my shows

I am a French aristocrat, called upon by my sovereign to manage the most devious and disreputable matters. I have lived an unconventional life, between accomplishing impossible tasks and keeping unspeakable secrets. It has opened my eyes to the world beyond the prosaic limits to which most are accustomed. In an effort to escape my adventurous life, I have more than once tried to start a family. However, my efforts have always ended in ruin, a price I must pay for the secrets I keep. I have lost six lovers, each killed by enemies and dangers that I naively hoped I could exclude from my life. That is why I volunteered for the Order, took an oath to weed out the darkness in this world, and sought revenge for the lives that were stolen from me.

My specialty is problem solving and I have a talent for analyzing every situation, allowing me to find resources and discover clues. Managing danger requires calm and concentration, and so I hate acting precipitously.
I am an educated man who has studied the arts and sciences. I use this knowledge to uncover truths and reveal mysteries. I hate secrets, but only when I don’t know them.

Under the facade of a respectable man hides a skilled, unscrupulous problem-solver. I know how to kill and how to act with decisiveness. Everyone has done something they are not proud of and I can’t stand seeing the hypocrites who pretend as if they are morally superior to others.

If you’ve seen it once, you can do it yourself even better. You may spend 1 Soma to replicate the effect of a Gift from a Hunter or NPC you witnessed during the Scenario. Particular Gifts may still be off limits or only yield a part of their effect at the Storyteller’s discretion. You cannot replicate more than one Gift at a time. Once per Scene, you may ask the Storyteller to reveal to you a Gift of an NPC that you had time to study.

Once per Scene, you can use one of the magic keys you own. Choose an effect: 1. Open a closed door, no matter how many locks or defenses it has. 2. If a subject touches your key, discover the strongest feeling they are experiencing. 3. Close and lock a door so that no conventional methods will be able to open it. 4. If you put your key in the mouth of a dead person you will see some of their memories. The Storyteller will describe them to you, focusing on your areas of interest.

You may appear as a civilized gentleman, but appearances can be deceiving. When necessary, you will not hesitate to kill. If you eliminate an NPC by inflicting a final Wound, you can also immediately eliminate a second Minor NPC. When you successfully defend yourself from a violent action, you can immediately eliminate a Minor NPC in response. Either way, the target must be within range of your wrath. After inflicting 1 Wound to someone, you can move freely as an additional action, allowing you to reach your true goal without anyone preventing you from doing so.
Reveal your dark side by injuring someone or acting aggressively despite your outwardly calm and staid appearance.
Nobleman’s clothes
a long black cape
a large bunch of keys
a fine dueling blade
snuff of excellent quality
a few doses of deadly Aqua Tofana
a large amount of coins and precious trinkets
a heart-shaped locket hanging from a gold chain with the names of my lost loves engraved within

I am a traveling artist who has known fame and honor in my homeland, Japan. That prestige meant nothing, however, when I found true love with Akihiro, son of a powerful noble family. When they forbade him from seeing me, we fled together to the remote region of Ezo. Even there we were not beyond the reach of Akihiro’s family and they pursued us into the high, snow-capped mountains. We had escaped every assassin, but could not outwit the snowstorm that trapped us. I survived, but only because Akihiro sacrificed the warmth of his life to save mine. But the cold has left me changed. It has become part of me and now the only thing that can make me feel warm is the hot blood of others. After taking revenge on all those who took Akihiro from me, I fled far away, using my talent for art to gain prestige and the protection of wealthy western nobles. Now, in the service of the Order, I save others from suffering the injustice that I have experienced, by punishing selfishness and wickedness.
I am a highly skilled artist. Music, dance, and painting hold no mysteries for me. My otherworldly charm captivates ordinary people, always drawing attention to me.
I cannot feel pain and my frail appearance hides surprising physical abilities. Blood is the only thing that can warm me and its smell alone makes me shiver.

My body is pure ice and, because of this, I can manipulate ice as I please. However, I hate to manifest my power because it is dangerous to those around me and, as an artist, my purpose is to make people smile.

When you perform or flaunt your talents, all eyes will be on you. Receive 1 Additional Success for each Position Check you make to attract attention or charm someone. If you get an Outcome with an Increment, you may declare that a subject who has seen you has fallen in love with you. The Storyteller will create a specific Agenda for them that leads them to seek your attention.

Once per Scene, you can consume a person’s blood when inflicting 1 non-fatal Wound. You recover 1 Wound, 1 Soma and receive some information about your victim such as a memory, an emotion or their heart’s desire. When you drink blood roll a die: if you roll a 1, you lose control and you will kill your victim by draining their blood, unless someone stops you.

You have control over your body temperature and, consequently, you can freeze the environment or objects in your immediate vicinity. When you manipulate ice, choose an effect by creating a Descriptor that represents it such as: Frozen Door or Aura of Frost and spend 1 Soma to manifest it for the whole Scene. As an additional effect, your frost can inflict 1 Wound on those who interact with it or make what you freeze incredibly fragile or incredibly hard. Whoever exploits the effects of frost in their favor gains 1 Additional Success for their action. Your frost has no direct effect on living things.
Shed your disguise as a simple artist and reveal your true, bitterly cold form or react passionately when fear and intimidation are used for selfish reasons.
A travel kimono
a stage kimono and theatrical effects
a small ice sphere that never melts
a butterfly-shaped hair clip (reminder of Akihiro)
a finely crafted shamisen
a pair of fine fans
several daggers hidden in the kimono
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.james-th: I have been a lot of things in my life: ship captain, duellist of great renown, and lover of the most beautiful noblewomen. After years of successes and victories, a mysterious child defeated me with deception. This despicable boy led me into the lair of a dangerous beast and, after imprisoning me, left me to be eaten by the monster. I survived, though I lost a hand... I know for certain he who I seek is no human, and I joined the Order to hunt down the child I hate above all else, and thus have my revenge.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.garou-th: I am a mountain wolf and far more cunning than the stupid villagers who tremble at the mere sight of me. I have lived proudly at the head of my pack, leading a thousand raids and eating succulent, tender morsels of human flesh. But I am not so old I cannot face those who hate me the most, though I may be hunted and reviled. Now that I’m part of the Order, I use my strength to defend the weak hunters who are my companions, knowing that with a single bite I could end their insignificant lives.
BROKENTALES.Content.cazador.the-astonish: The Astonishing Pied Piper Without a Name
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.the-asto: I have always made my art my reason for living. I can play so skillfully that it might as well be magic. I have learned to use the power of music to reach into the souls of both humans and animals. Unfortunately, I have lost count of the number of times I have performed dishonorable acts while pursuing the perfect melody. Having been guilty of various crimes and having taken revenge on those who mocked my sincere love for music, I serenely waited for my execution. The Order freed me in exchange for a promise to serve them and put my skills to work in the fight against Darkness. It was in the darkest moments that I glimpsed the perfect melody, so perhaps as a Hunter, I can find it and make it my own.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.baba-yag: I am a child witch, and my power is equal only to my ambition. I did not have a childhood, for I was born already aware of my abilities. To most, I seem cynical and cruel. That is because they do not understand that they are pawns, insignificant pieces in the bloody games that witches and warlocks play. The Order does not look down on my age, which is why it has given me the leadership I deserve.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.regina-t: I was born to be a leader and I have always surrounded myself with faithful followers ready to satisfy my every whim. Lacking the benefit of noble birth, the power I held was pried from the hands of those less deserving to wield it, no matter the cost. I ruled armies of thugs, and broke the hearts of both men and women. After each conquest, I set out in search of a bigger challenge. Because there is still so much out there that should be rightfully mine, I always want more. The Order has given me a new purpose, a new perspective, and new creatures to enslave.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.babai-th: After years of honorable service as State Inquisitor of the Republic of Venice, my body and spirit have undergone a rare mutation and fear is now unknown to me. People have always called me Bogeyman, fearing the justice that I represented. Perhaps my own absence of fear made me even more terrifying in the eyes of mortals. The Order has given me a new assignment because even in the fight against darkness, someone needs to be ready to judge what is right and what is wrong.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.the-woma: My memory is gone. The first thing I remember is the Order finding me, wandering in the woods naked and covered in blood. I possess extraordinary strength and a feral instinct, such that any civilized society ought to chain me like a monster. I know that in my past is a sin so great, my memory could not bear the weight of it. But, I want to remember and perhaps by serving the Order I will be able to do so. I have a natural soft spot for children, and I can’t stand to see them get hurt. The Order uses me as a weapon in the most serious matters when it is necessary to act decisively and demonstrate that a Hunter is a force to be reckoned with.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.theimmor: I am a sorcerer who has found the key to immortality. Long life has only whetted my appetite for power and in its pursuit, I have been stained by every sin. The secret behind my unending existence is that I have hidden my soul, removing it from my body. Unfortunately, the Order found its hiding place and now it is held beyond my reach in a fortified church, leaving me no choice but to submit to their commands. Guilty of one thousand and one crimes, the Order demands I balance each with one thousand and one acts of virtue. According to those foolish preachers, they are leading me down the path of redemption. In truth, the Order treats me as a servant, giving to me only the most thankless tasks, knowing that I can not be subdued by death. I remain humble and silent, waiting for the day when I will discover where they have hidden my soul. Then I will unleash my revenge and annihilate the entire Papacy...
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.marina-t: I am a traveler, and, over the years, I have visited every location known to man. Being a traveling merchant has allowed me to easily hide my talents as a witch from prying eyes. Year after year, I have accumulated all kinds of magical and mundane wealth. But the Order found me and forced me to sign the most one-sided contract of my entire career as a trader. Now I must put my skills and my charisma at the service of the Order, trying to earn as much as possible to redeem the enormous debt that they have made me incur through deceit.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.niklaus-: I am a devoted clergyman who has always dedicated his life to helping others. Over the years I have become a talented exorcist and this vocation of mine led me to the remote village of Borgo Maleanime. There, I fought a particularly insidious demon, who concealed itself among the ranks of a gang of young thugs who merely pretended to be demons to scare people. It was a tough fight, but I finally got the better of the fiend. Or so I thought. Something in the exorcism did not go as expected and now the demon dwells inside me, sowing fear and pain whenever it re-emerges. The Order welcomed me into its ranks as an exorcist and I gladly accepted this role, with the hope that the missions entrusted to me would allow me to find a way to rid myself, once and for all, of that which hides within me.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.george-t: I am the most skilled and trusted agent of the Papacy and as such, it is my responsibility to make sure that the fight against darkness never falters. As a child, I fell into a river and almost drowned, but was saved by a creature that I later discovered was a dragon. When I grew up, I took holy vows and joined the Church. In doing so, I discovered that what I believed to be my savior was actually a creature of darkness, ready to steal my soul. I vowed to fight the darkness, suppressing the feeling of gratitude toward the dragon that saved me, which has always plagued me. Such weakness represents a crack through which evil could slither in. No mercy for monsters, no forgiveness for those who would join and serve the forces of evil.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.sun-wuko: I have no memory of my life before my captivity, although I often dream of the forests and snow-capped peaks of my beloved China. I grew up as a circus animal at London’s Royal Circus but, deep within I carry the conviction that I am destined for something else. I rebelled by killing all my captors, fleeing across a vast and labyrinthine city. When the Order reached me, I thought it was the end, but the Hunters took me with them as their guardian and defender. The more I live as a Hunter, the closer I draw to transcendence. Now I am aware that, someday, I will discover who I really am.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.verdoux-: I am a French aristocrat, called upon by my sovereign to manage the most devious and disreputable matters. I have lived an unconventional life, between accomplishing impossible tasks and keeping unspeakable secrets. It has opened my eyes to the world beyond the prosaic limits to which most are accustomed. In an effort to escape my adventurous life, I have more than once tried to start a family. However, my efforts have always ended in ruin, a price I must pay for the secrets I keep. I have lost six lovers, each killed by enemies and dangers that I naively hoped I could exclude from my life. That is why I volunteered for the Order, took an oath to weed out the darkness in this world, and sought revenge for the lives that were stolen from me.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.yukie-on: I am a traveling artist who has known fame and honor in my homeland, Japan. That prestige meant nothing, however, when I found true love with Akihiro, son of a powerful noble family. When they forbade him from seeing me, we fled together to the remote region of Ezo. Even there we were not beyond the reach of Akihiro’s family and they pursued us into the high, snow-capped mountains. We had escaped every assassin, but could not outwit the snowstorm that trapped us. I survived, but only because Akihiro sacrificed the warmth of his life to save mine. But the cold has left me changed. It has become part of me and now the only thing that can make me feel warm is the hot blood of others. After taking revenge on all those who took Akihiro from me, I fled far away, using my talent for art to gain prestige and the protection of wealthy western nobles. Now, in the service of the Order, I save others from suffering the injustice that I have experienced, by punishing selfishness and wickedness.
BROKENTALES.Content.cazador.cunning-mach: Cunning Machiavelli the Fox and Sly Bischeri the Cat
BROKENTALES.ContentText.cazador.cunning-: We are two boys who survived and thrived on the street through trickery and deceit. Unfortunately, we made a terrible mistake by choosing a weird old lady as a mark. She turned out to be a goddamn witch. The witch cursed us… And from that day on, every twelve hours, one becomes a Fox and the other a Cat. Bound by this spell, we found a way to make a lot of money, deceiving stupid nobles and rich merchants. The Order has noticed us and taken us under its wing, with the promise of breaking the curse that afflicts us.
With a Sword or a Smile
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.wit: Associated Descriptor I am a skilled swordsman and possess fine manners, which is why the Order considers me an excellent candidate to move among High Society. I love indulging in good food and dissolute company. Gift Once per Scene you may perform a gesture of extreme precision with your weapon, such as slipping an object off someone or writing something on a surface. The person observing your skill will either be impressed or intimidated, depending on the Storyteller’s decision. You receive 1 Additional Success when you use the emotion you have aroused to your advantage.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.tic: Associated Descriptor I have learned to face monsters and aberrations without being intimidated. The Beast is on my trail because, having tasted my flesh, it can no longer do without it… Gift While outdoors, you may ask the Storyteller for the Beast to come in search of your flesh. The Beast is a monstrous NPC with the following characteristics: OL Hard 7 – (4 Wounds). Descriptor (the Beast): I am a great and mighty beast. I overwhelm everything I come across on my way to snatch my prey. Gift – Ravenous Madness: The Beast has an insane craving for your flesh, and will unleash its rage on anyone standing in its way. With its titanic strength, it can tear down trees and walls, and hurl a man away with a single swipe of its huge paws. The Beast is also quite stupid and will leave the Scene as soon as you are out of sight. You receive 2 Additional Successes to any Defense Check against it. If the Beast suffers the fourth Wound, it will dissolve. However, it will regenerate and can be used in the next Scene.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.fin: Associated Descriptor My senses are unfailing. Nothing can escape my sense of smell and that is why the Order uses me as a guardian. I hate strong smells and loud noises because they feel like burning irons to acute senses. Gift Once you catch someone’s scent, you never forget it. During a Scene, you can spend 1 Soma to memorize the scent of a person you are interacting with. You will always recognize it and it will be easy for you to follow its traces even after some time. If you concentrate, you can hear a noise even at great distances. When someone approaches you, the Storyteller will warn you long before anyone else in the Scene would notice.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.wol: Associated Descriptor A true predator knows how to appear as the most helpless of lambs. I know how to disguise myself. My confidence is boundless and I often tend to underestimate danger, ready to risk anything for a tasty bite. Gift You may spend 1 Soma to assume the shape of a common human. Create a Descriptor that represents you and includes at least one of these words: Old, Helpless, Weak. In your human form you can speak and act without problems, but, as soon as you use your Dark Ego, you will immediately lose the effect of Wolf Among the Lambs. You receive 1 Additional Success when you use the Descriptor you created to deceive someone and catch them off guard.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.sou: Associated Descriptor With my pipe I can play any melody and touch the hearts of living beings. Art needs time to express itself. Gift When you play your pipes you can spend 1 Soma to sing a special melody. Choose from: 1. Imparting an emotion: Create a Descriptor that represents the emotional state you wish to convey. Everybody present will receive that Descriptor for the current Scene. You may have to make a Position Check to affect opponents. 2. Bewitching animals: You may give simple commands to animals that hear your melody. If they show an aggressive attitude, you have to make a successful Position Check for your melody to take effect. As long as you are playing, you may ask the animals to do simple actions such as moving or following a simple command.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.ski: Associated Descriptor I am a skilled acrobat and musician. My talent is unrivaled and the Order has chosen me for my ability to capture people’s attention and stimulate their emotions. When I am in the grip of artistic inspiration, I am totally divorced from reality. Gift When you sing, dance, or move with grace, you always put on a great show. As an additional action, you can spend 1 Soma and decide on one of the following effects: 1. You can make an incredible leap, many feet high, without anyone being able to stop you. 2. You may take an object, even if it is worn by an enemy. 3. You can perform a minor action with a stunt, such as opening a door or flipping a switch, and then return exactly to where you started.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.mag: Associated Descriptor I am a sorceress and my magical powers allow me to do whatever I want. I need the right amount of time to cast my spells. Gift When you want to achieve something, you may use witchcraft. Choose what you want with a sentence like: I want to fly on that old broom, or I want to look like a demon in the eyes of those fools. Your spell must be focused on an object in your possession, such as a broom to fly or a mask you can wear to look like a demon. Pay a cost from 0 to 2 Soma, decided by the Storyteller, to activate your spell for the duration of a Scene. Remember that you can’t ask for someone’s sudden death, but you can inflict Wounds with your actions through magic.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.lis: Associated Descriptor I am very skilled at reading people, that is why the Order has chosen me as leader of the Hunters. I love manipulating people and I often do it merely to amuse myself. Gift Once per Scene, when you talk to someone, you can ask the Storyteller a question about them. The question must be regarding their behaviour, such as any vices or their desires they might have. You gain 1 Additional Success in any action where you exploit what you’ve discovered.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.i.w: Associated Descriptor I am determined to get what I want, and nothing will get in my way. I will kill, humiliate, or conquer anything that stands between me and my objective. As you can imagine, I sincerely hate being told no! Gift When you act with clear and direct intention to achieve an objective, you get 1 Additional Success on each Position Check. Once per Session, you can turn a Failure into an Outcome with Increment. Describe how you grit your teeth and fight to get what you want.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.the: Associated Descriptor Thanks to my contacts and charisma, I always have an ace up my sleeve: followers ready to help me and allies who owe me favors. Maintaining an empire of beneficial connections requires commitment and resources. Gift During a Scene you always have a couple of trusted servants with you, ready to execute your every order. Create a Descriptor for each, which represents the skill for which you hold them in your service. Your servants will do their best to satisfy your every wish. Decide how you pay them. The Storyteller, when and if they deem it necessary, will ask you to honor their services so as not to lose the use of this Gift for the rest of the Scene. You can check this Descriptor multiple times to get XP.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.eye: Associated Descriptor I am good at understanding, evaluating, and grasping every hidden detail, which is why the Order wanted me as a judge. I am cold, methodical, and cannot stand when plans change abruptly. Gift Once per Scene, when you meet a group of NPCs you will immediately understand who is the most and the least capable of them. Moreover, the Storyteller will also reveal to you if there are relationships such as love, hate, or fidelity between two NPCs of your choice. Receive 1 Additional Success when you use the information you have discovered to intimidate or question someone.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.lik: Associated Descriptor My body is made of pure shadow and I can become intangible for brief moments. I hate sunlight and cannot properly focus when not surrounded by a comforting shadow. Gift You can spend 1 Soma to manipulate the shadows to your advantage, choose from: 1. Acquire a small object, even if it is held by someone, as long as you can see it. 2. Make an object in your immediate vicinity topple down. 3. Stretch a shadow and manipulate its shape to make it look different. Additionally, you always receive 1 Additional Success on any Defense Check you make while in a shaded area. If you get a successful Outcome, as an additional effect you can move from one shadow to another and no one can prevent it.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.the: Associated Descriptor I am incredibly strong. Despite my petite looks, I am tougher than the sturdiest of men. I struggle to control my strength and often end up damaging things unintentionally. Gift You receive 1 Additional Success to any Position Check that requires you to resort to your strength. If you eliminate a living being by causing a Wound, you can do it in an extremely disturbing way. Anyone who witnesses it, at the discretion of the Storyteller, will lower their Opposition Level by 1 for the next action.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.hom: Associated Descriptor Sometimes I manifest strange abilities, the legacy of a past that I no longer remember. But, when I need it, the world around me shapes itself to protect and shelter me. I hate being out in the open and being the center of attention. Gift You can spend 1 Soma to draw on the strange powers of the witch you once were. When you do so, choose one of the following effects: 1. Create a shelter for one person, perfectly camouflaged within the environment. 2. Reshape a plant to create ladders, shields, or other simple structures. 3. Make something disgusting/rotten edible and sweet, restoring 1 Wound to whoever eats it (except yourself).
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.mem: Associated Descriptor I have knowledge and wisdom drawn from centuries of existence, which I can conjure to mind when needed. I often get lost in the memories of my past glories, forgetting about the world around me. Gift You have been alive for an indefinite time and know almost everything. Once per Scene, you may ask for information about the past or a specific subject or place, which is only available to you due to your long history. The Storyteller will provide relevant and useful details. Once per Scene, you may also change the above Descriptor associated with this Gift to one that represents a skill you have conjured to your immortal mind. This new Descriptor is yours until the end of the Scene, and you receive 1 Additional Success the first time you use it for a Check.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.the: Associated Descriptor The Order uses my powers for their own purposes and I have had to become skilled at understanding and supporting the needs of my allies as a result. Although I hate to admit it, over time I have begun to take some pleasure in doing good deeds. Gift Once per Scene, as an additional action, you can grant 1 Additional Success to an ally’s action if you can narratively support them. You can also always spend your Soma to pay the activation cost of your allies’ Gifts.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.sea: Associated Descriptor I am a sea witch, and as such, I have the power to shape water and move it at will. I hate enclosed places, cut off from the presence of my beloved sea. Gift You can unleash your witch powers and control seawater, manipulating it as if it were solid. You can use it as a weapon or as an object to support your actions, giving it the consistency of a whip that can reach up to thirty feet. When you act, you can take a second supporting action, such as picking up something, moving someone you want to defend, or hindering an enemy’s movement thanks to the water you manipulate. You can also use this Gift with fresh water, but you will need to spend 1 Soma to do so.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.mut: Associated Descriptor Nobody knows my true form, which I hide under an appearance of eternal youth. I can change shape to some extent, while still remaining in human form. I am hopelessly attracted to all forms of beauty and I often get lost in contemplating it. Gift Once per Scene you can change your appearance. Create a Descriptor that represents your new appearance. Nobody can pierce your deception, except through magical means or Gifts that allow one to discover the truth. In addition, you may spend 1 Soma to take the specific appearance of a person you have already met, mimicking their voice and manners as well. You can keep your new appearance until the Scene is over.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.exo: Associated Descriptor I am a skilled exorcist. I know how to identify and fight evil through prayer and the sacred arts. Despite what I am, I hate holy places and manifestations of faith and religion, as they cause the demon inside me to stir. Gift When you face a clearly supernatural being, you gain 1 Additional Success on all Checks. You can also invoke sacred rites and prayers to disturb the evil you face. If a subject, artifact, or supernatural manifestation uses a Gift that you know of or have already seen in action, you can spend 1 Soma to prevent its use. Each time you activate this Gift, roll 1 die. If you roll a 5 or a 6, you gain 1 Devil Token.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.the: Associated Descriptor I am good at understanding people and helping them. Now, thanks to the demon that dwells in me, I can even perceive the dark side of people. Every so often, however, the demon takes over, making me behave strangely in front of ordinary people. Gift Once per Scene, you can release the inner demon, whether that’d be yours or someone else’s. In your case, create a Descriptor that represents an emotion that includes the word Anger, Envy, or Wickedness. You receive 2 Additional Successes the first time you use this Descriptor for a Position Check. If you unleash someone else’s inner demon, the Storyteller will create a Descriptor for them that showcases their hidden, dark side. When using this Gift on particularly powerful individuals, the Storyteller may request a Position Check from you to succeed. Each time you use this Gift, you receive 1 Devil Token.

Associated Descriptor I have dedicated my life to slaying monsters and aberrations, honing my body and my skill for that purpose. My strict discipline makes me rarely inclined to forgive the mistakes of others. Gift You’re skilled at slaying monsters and demonic creatures in the name of faith. You start each Scenario with 1 Fervor Token. When facing an enemy that is obviously monstrous, if you get a successful Outcome on a Position Check, you can spend 1 Fervor Token to inflict 1 additional Wound. When such an enemy attempts to overwhelm you using one of their Gifts, you can spend 1 Fervor Token to receive 2 Additional Successes to your Defense Check. When you suffer 1 Wound, you receive 1 Fervor Token.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.age: Associated Descriptor I have vowed to eradicate all evil from this world and nothing can escape my inquisitive gaze. I hate all secrets, for I know that the seed of evil may grow within anyone. Gift When you speak to a crowd you can infuse their hearts with the light of faith. Spend 1 Fervor Token and you can create a Descriptor that represents a feeling of faith, anger, and a desire for justice against evil. Alternatively, create a Descriptor that represents trust and submission in such faith. The crowd will act accordingly for the rest of the Scene, but particularly powerful NPCs may be immune to your words. Receive 1 Additional Success on any Check you make using the sentiment you inspired. When you publicly expose evil, you receive 1 Fervor Token.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.gua: Associated Descriptor I am a skilled guardian. My body is strong and hardened, my senses sharp and alert. Years of captivity have made me submissive, and I struggle not to follow every order I am given. Gift You can intercept a danger before it overwhelms your ally. You may spend 1 Soma to get between an ally and a danger by standing in their place. Receive 1 Additional Success to any Defense Check you have to perform doing so. Once per Scenario, you can ignore 1 Wound you suffer.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.mon: Associated Descriptor I am stronger and faster than any human and I am a highly skilled fighter. I don’t shy away from a challenge because I always believe I can win. Gift You are able to perform athletic feats unthinkable to a mere mortal. You may spend 1 Soma and choose an effect: 1. You can jump incredibly far, up to thirty feet. You can bring another person with you by carrying them on your shoulders. You also ignore any damage related to a fall. 2. Use your tail to manipulate an object and perform an additional action. 3. Ignore any physical impediments to movement by using your impressive skills.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.pro: Associated Descriptor My specialty is problem solving and I have a talent for analyzing every situation, allowing me to find resources and discover clues. Managing danger requires calm and concentration, and so I hate acting precipitously. Gift If you’ve seen it once, you can do it yourself even better. You may spend 1 Soma to replicate the effect of a Gift from a Hunter or NPC you witnessed during the Scenario. Particular Gifts may still be off limits or only yield a part of their effect at the Storyteller’s discretion. You cannot replicate more than one Gift at a time. Once per Scene, you may ask the Storyteller to reveal to you a Gift of an NPC that you had time to study.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.the: Associated Descriptor I am an educated man who has studied the arts and sciences. I use this knowledge to uncover truths and reveal mysteries. I hate secrets, but only when I don’t know them. Gift Once per Scene, you can use one of the magic keys you own. Choose an effect: 1. Open a closed door, no matter how many locks or defenses it has. 2. If a subject touches your key, discover the strongest feeling they are experiencing. 3. Close and lock a door so that no conventional methods will be able to open it. 4. If you put your key in the mouth of a dead person you will see some of their memories. The Storyteller will describe them to you, focusing on your areas of interest.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.oth: Associated Descriptor I am a highly skilled artist. Music, dance, and painting hold no mysteries for me. My otherworldly charm captivates ordinary people, always drawing attention to me. Gift When you perform or flaunt your talents, all eyes will be on you. Receive 1 Additional Success for each Position Check you make to attract attention or charm someone. If you get an Outcome with an Increment, you may declare that a subject who has seen you has fallen in love with you. The Storyteller will create a specific Agenda for them that leads them to seek your attention.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.blo: Associated Descriptor I cannot feel pain and my frail appearance hides surprising physical abilities. Blood is the only thing that can warm me and its smell alone makes me shiver. Gift Once per Scene, you can consume a person’s blood when inflicting 1 non-fatal Wound. You recover 1 Wound, 1 Soma and receive some information about your victim such as a memory, an emotion or their heart’s desire. When you drink blood roll a die: if you roll a 1, you lose control and you will kill your victim by draining their blood, unless someone stops you.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.bel: Associated Descriptor Cunning's Descriptor: I have a natural talent for telling lies, which the Order often uses to its advantage. Despite my origins, I know a great deal about many things because lying requires planning and preparation. Gift Once per Scene, you can tell everyone something that will be accepted without question until the lie is uncovered. The deception becomes obvious at the end of the Scene or once exposed. Gain +1 Success on any Check where you exploit the lie.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.rog: Associated Descriptor Sly's Descriptor: A life on the road has taught me to be a skilled thief. Everyone for themselves is my motto. Gift By pretending to be weak during a Scene, NPCs will overlook you unless you acted against them. By spending 1 Soma, you can flee any Scene involving a crowd.
BROKENTALES.ContentText.content.gift.par: Associated Descriptor Common Descriptor: I will stop at nothing to get what I want, and it only takes me a few seconds to evaluate what is happening and find the right way to take advantage of it. I hate acting alone because there's no one to take the blame. Gift Once per Scene, when an ally acts with your support, they receive +1 Additional Success. Additionally, if an ally achieves an Outcome with an Increment, you may immediately take an extra action.
BROKENTALES.Content.content.darkEgo.dark: Dark Ego - I Will Have My Satisfaction
Associated Descriptor I am a man of the world and nothing can really surprise me anymore. I never question myself. After all, I’m the best at what I do. Dark Ego When you choose an opponent, there is no escape for them. Once per Scene, you can take an additional action against the target of your challenge (even if you had already acted during this Exchange) to anticipate their move and stop their action with yours. If an opponent inflicts a Wound on you, you savor the taste of the challenge and receive 1 Additional Success at each Check against them for the rest of the Scenario.
You challenge an enemy or otherwise make clear who and how skilled you are.
BROKENTALES.Content.content.darkEgo.dark: Dark Ego - The Big Bad Wolf
Associated Descriptor I am fiercer and more powerful than any human and my fangs can pierce even metal. My proud wolf spirit is everything to me. Dark Ego You are hardened by a lifetime in the great mountains and your skill is matched only by your courage. When you unleash your rage, create a Descriptor for it that includes at least one of these words: Strong, Fierce, Unstoppable. You can employ the strength of three men, gnaw through stone as easily as flesh, or break down any barrier. When you act using this special Descriptor for Position Checks, you get 1 Additional Success. Once per Scene, you can unleash your rage and receive 3 Additional Successes instead of 1.
You assume the form of a Wolf or reveal yourself for what you really are, scaring off weak humans.
BROKENTALES.Content.content.darkEgo.dark: Dark Ego - The Power of Music
Associated Descriptor As an artist I have traveled to many places and I know many myths and legends. I’m hungry for knowledge and I’m fascinated by everything I don’t know. Dark Ego Once per Scene, you can make a sound that can be heard by whomever you wish, even from a great distance. Everyone who hears it suffers 1 Wound, fragile objects break, and frightened animals flee. Alternatively, you can play a gentle melody and the wind itself will obey you, carrying your message to whomever you wish, wherever they are. When using The Power of Music, you can also activate a Soul Music effect on one or more targets of your choice.
Demonstrate your art to its fullest extent, with a show that cannot be ignored.

Associated Descriptor Like any respectable sorceress, I carry my trusty bag full of herbs, poisons, and all kinds of magic tools. My childlike appearance is often useful, but sometimes it leads others to underestimate me. I hate that. Dark Ego Receive 1 Additional Success on any Check when you use one of your spells, either through the Magic Gift or by inserting it into your narrative through the Descriptors. Moreover, you can unleash your evil aura to gain one or more of the following effects: 1. Animals and ordinary people are tormented by your presence and will flee in terror. 2. You gain 1 Additional Success if you use your magic to punish someone for breaking a promise or agreement you made earlier. 3. In the area around you, you can summon daylight or darkness.
Scare ordinary people or dispense punishment through your magic.

Associated Descriptor I have an enviable charm and love to dress up to fit the role I have chosen. Even when I try to restrain myself, I never go unnoticed. Dark Ego You know that your way is the only right way to do things. During the Scene, as an additional action, you can choose another character who will be issued a command. In the case of an ally, if they do exactly what you tell them, they will receive 1 Additional Success to their action or increase their Opposition Level by 1. If you give a peremptory order to ensnare an enemy, they will lower their Opposition Level by 1 or, if you’ve already seen it in action, you can prevent them from using one of their Gifts. Once per Scene, you can shout, drawing everyone’s attention to you. For a few moments, they will pause to listen to what you have to say.
Take control of a situation and impose your decisions by dramatically drawing attention to yourself.
BROKENTALES.Content.content.darkEgo.dark: Dark Ego - If you don’t Stop, I’ll Call the Bogeyman!
Associated Descriptor My presence intimidates people, touching the fear that dwells deep in their hearts. The presence of children and their innocent way of looking at the world makes me uneasy. Dark Ego You are like a sinuous shadow that can reach anywhere. During a Scene, you can arrive at a location by covering any distance and overcoming any obstacle if one of your allies or an NPC calls your name. When you manifest your true nature, everyone who witnesses it will be frightened and will not act against you unless you threaten them first. The Storyteller may ask you for a Position Check to frighten particularly powerful characters. Receive 1 Additional Success on all Defense Checks you make against the actions of someone who is now fearful.
Enter or leave a shadow by manifesting your true nature and scaring someone.
BROKENTALES.Content.content.darkEgo.dark: Dark Ego - Soft and Succulent Flesh
Associated Descriptor I love human flesh and can gain insight about people just looking at them. I am helplessly attracted to those who have a particular physical trait that stimulates my appetite, such as a good smell or velvety skin. Dark Ego The truth is that you crave human flesh, especially when raw and taken from evil people.
